div.h2: File Serve Data Flow: open() → stat() → headers → read() → send() Loop

p.em: Two kernel copies: page cache → read_buf → socket send buffer

div.p: ⚠️ file_fd MUST be close()d on EVERY exit path:
Copy 2: read_buf → kernel socket send buffer (user-to-kernel copy via send()) ~10 GB/s for loopback
Copy 1: kernel page cache → read_buf (kernel-to-user copy via syscall) ~10 GB/s for hot cache
